title: Void's Transparent GUI
body:
Have you ever been killed while crafting something and thought, "If only I could've seen that threat through the crafting grid...."

Well, now you can!

![Transparent survival inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3e25050b3f6f4f1c5a507f8fbec3532f2c8aab5.png)

# Features
This resource pack modifies all interfaces to make them transparent and see-through. It balances form and function by reducing the amount of interface on your screen while not sacrificing aesthetics and a vanilla look and feel. It also blends the traditional transparent and dark GUI styles together to make an interface that is very pleasant on the eyes. 

This pack includes
* Advancements
* Anvil
* Beacon
* Blast Furnace
* Brewing Stand
* Cartography Table
* Chests (single, double, barrel, ender)
* Crafter
* Crafting Table
* Creative Inventory
* Dispenser
* Enchanting Table
* Furnace
* Grindstone
* Hopper
* Horse
* Inventory
* Loom
* Recipe Book
* Shulker Box
* Smithing
* Smoker
* Social Interaction
* Stonecutter
* Villager
* and Various Realms-related pop-ups and buttons

# Credits
* [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/terms/) for the base textures that I took inspiration from/built off of.
* [Lunar Client](https://www.lunarclient.com/), which I used in many of the screenshots in the gallery for their menu blur.
